## canvas
- viewBox: 0 0 1280 720

## page_rhythm
- P01: dense
- P02: breathing
- P03: dense

## layout_quality
- P01: text_budget=medium; risk=cards-overflow; review_hint=wrap-risk
- P02: text_budget=low; risk=none; review_hint=manual
- P03: text_budget=medium; risk=multi-panel; review_hint=panel-risk
- P04: text_budget=low; risk=image-overlay; review_hint=overlay-risk
- P05: text_budget=low; risk=none; review_hint=manual
